description: Marriage contract. Location: Barqa (Libya). Dated: Thursday 5 Elul 4750 AM, which is 28 August 990 CE. The contract explicitly states that it follows the local custom of Tripoli, Libya, and has some peculiar traits which set it apart from similar documents from other countries. The bride, Ḥasana bt. Yosef al-Ṣarfī, was an heiress. This may account for the fact that she was not provided with a trousseau by her father but received a payment from her future husband, Aharon b. Yeshuʿa, to buy herself an outfit. The settlement is signed by 36 persons, possibly all guests present, only two of whom were witnesses. (Information from Goitein notes linked below.)
description_he: חוזה נישואין מברקה (לוב); יום חמישי ה' באלול 4750 לבריאה (28 באוגוסט 990 לספירה); כלה: חסנה בת יוסף אל-צרפי; חתן: אהרון בן ישועה; 36 חותמים
